cases.prompt_body: Tight rear-quarter view of a 737 MAX 8 in climb, aft fuselage, vertical tail, and horizontal stabilizer clearly readable and canonical, one visible nose-down trim state in the tailplane while the rest of the aircraft remains rigid and credible, muted overcast sky, silver body, dark tail, restrained aviation tension, no readable livery

styles.negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, ui overlay, crowded scene, many small objects, unreadable background detail, motion blur, action pose, blockbuster cinematic lighting, poster design, collage fragments, multiple surreal events, competing bright accents
styles.positive_prompt: restrained documentary-surreal image, one clear subject or scene, subject remains recognizable after simplification, one dominant anomaly or contradiction, controlled palette, restrained lighting, clear silhouette, low clutter, non-spectacular tension, Tight rear-quarter view of a 737 MAX 8 in climb, aft fuselage, vertical tail, and horizontal stabilizer clearly readable and canonical, one visible nose-down trim state in the tailplane while the rest of the aircraft remains rigid and credible, muted overcast sky, silver body, dark tail, restrained aviation tension, no readable livery
